featurehub.feat_midnight_confess_desc: Posts only visible between 23:00–05:00 at night — a safe space for your most honest thoughts

featurehub.feat_echo_detector_desc: Warns you when your feed becomes one-sided — helps you keep a diversity of viewpoints

about.title: About
about.founder_role: Founder, Director & Physician — born 1986 in Navoiy, Uzbekistan
about.mission_text: Building an AI-powered social platform that gives users full control over their personal data and digital life.
about.contact_hint: For questions or suggestions, please reach out via the in-app support.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: OlchaAI takes the security of your personal data seriously. This document explains what data we collect, how it is stored, and how it is protected — in line with GDPR and Uzbekistan's Law on Personal Data.
privacy_policy.collect_text: During registration we ask for your email, phone number, username, and password (stored encrypted). Photos, videos, posts, and messages you add to your profile are also stored to provide the platform's service.
privacy_policy.store_text: All passwords are irreversibly encrypted (hashed) and are never stored or displayed in plain text. Data is kept in encrypted databases on servers protected by security safeguards.
privacy_policy.share_text: Your personal data is never sold or shared with third parties for advertising or other purposes. Only the minimum data required is exchanged with our trusted payment provider (Stripe) to process payments securely.
privacy_policy.transfer_text: OlchaAI complies with the GDPR (European Union), CCPA (California, USA), and Uzbekistan's Law on Personal Data. Whenever data is transferred across borders, it is protected by the same level of encryption and security safeguards.
privacy_policy.retention_text: Your data is kept only for as long as your account remains active. When you request account deletion, all personal data is permanently removed from our systems, except for any minimum period required by law.
privacy_policy.cookies_text: The site uses only the cookies necessary to keep your session and improve the service. No third-party advertising tracking cookies are used.
privacy_policy.rights_text: At any time, from the settings section, you can view, edit, download your data, or delete your account entirely (under GDPR — the rights to access, rectification, erasure, portability, and objection to processing) — all of this works in real time within the app. You also retain the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy_policy.children_text: OlchaAI is not intended for children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect their data. If such a case is identified, the relevant data is removed immediately.
privacy_policy.breach_text: If a security breach is found to pose a risk to your data, we will notify you and the relevant supervisory authority within 72 hours, in line with GDPR requirements.
privacy_policy.changes_text: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. We will notify you in advance of any significant changes, via the app or by email.
privacy_policy.contact_text: If you have any privacy-related questions or requests, please reach out via the in-app support.
